scripts.lint: pnpm lint:node && pnpm lint:python && pnpm lint:rust
scripts.lint:node: biome lint --files-ignore-unknown=true src/index.ts src/core src/counters src/rules src/cli scripts/run-cases.js bench/*.mjs
scripts.lint:python: uv run --frozen --group dev ruff check python_impl bench scripts
scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust_impl/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path rust_impl/Cargo.toml --all-targets
scripts.bench:python: uv run --frozen python python_impl/num_yomi.py bench --cases test/cases.json --iterations 20000
scripts.bench:python:sample:replace:call: uv run --frozen python bench/bench_python_sample_replace_call.py --input test/sample.txt --expected test/sample.expected.txt --iterations 2000
scripts.bench:rust: cargo run --quiet --release --manifest-path rust_impl/Cargo.toml --bin num-yomi-rust -- bench --cases test/cases.json --iterations 20000
scripts.bench:rust:sample:replace:call: cargo run --quiet --release --manifest-path rust_impl/Cargo.toml --bin bench_sample_replace_call -- --input test/sample.txt --expected test/sample.expected.txt --iterations 2000
scripts.bench:compare:sample:replace: uv run --frozen python scripts/compare_sample_benchmark.py --input test/sample.txt --expected test/sample.expected.txt --iterations 2000
